title: My profile
subtitle: View and update your details, language and password.

language.title: Language
language.description: The change applies immediately across the app.
language.label: Preferred language

security.title: Security
security.description: Change your password. Your other sessions will be signed out.
security.passwordHint: At least 10 characters, with at least one letter and one number.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.passwordPolicy: At least 10 characters, with at least one letter and one number.

errors.UNEXPECTED: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please review the details you entered.
errors.UNSUPPORTED_LANGUAGE: The selected language is not available.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.PASSWORD_POLICY_VIOLATION: The new password does not meet the policy.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_NO_TIME: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
